assertions.description: The audio CODEC (U801, TLV320AIC23BPW) has I2S signals BCLK, LRCIN, LRCOUT, DIN, DOUT connected via hierarchical labels AUDIO_BIT_CLK, AUDIO_DAC_LR, AUDIO_ADC_LR, AUDIO_DAC_DAT, AUDIO_ADC_DATA. These are reported as 'single_pin_nets' in design_observations rather than being identified as an I2S bus. The I2C interface (SDIN/SCLK) is detected as an i2c_bus, but the I2S interface is missed entirely.
